title: Translate form with AI - more languages
excerpt:
Description
I would like to use AI translation of the form in other languages, not only those 22. I urgently need Hungarian and Romanian. These two and some others are really missing. I don`t uderstand why it is an issue…

posts.author: pfirt (Petr Fiřt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to use AI translation of the form in other languages, not only those 22. I urgently need Hungarian and Romanian. These two and some others are really missing. I don`t uderstand why it is an issue in times of AI??? Please add other languages…

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to achieve the forms to be much more complex and usable for all our subsidiaries. We have them in Hungary, Romania, Poland, Czech a Slovak, Croatia and some other. I need to create forms in English but not all of our colleagues speak English. So I need a translation. It is really crucial for us. Thank you.
